name: Rick Sellers Indoor Golf Center
address: 1712 E Hamilton Rd Units D and F, Bloomington, IL 61704
about: Rick Sellers Indoor Golf Center is a golf training facility in Quincy, IL, specializing in lessons, club fittings, and indoor practice. The center is run by Rick Sellers, a PGA Professional with over 25 years of experience, who provides instruction to golfers of all ages and skill levels. The facility features indoor technology for training, including a 'TECH Center' for advanced practice, and offers various programs ranging from youth development to high-performance coaching for experienced players. Services include private lessons, group classes, and custom Ping club fittings, with a focus on building solid fundamentals and a full understanding of the game.
why_golfers_like_it: PGA-led instruction with 25+ years of experience
Indoor facilities available for year-round practice
Full-game approach combining swing mechanics and course strategy

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service provided on-site.
No mention of alcohol service; BYOB not indicated.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Clubs are provided for use if needed, particularly for junior programs, but bringing your own clubs is recommended for club fittings and advanced lessons.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink services on-site, and no BYOB policy is specified, so it is recommended to check with the center directly.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time for 18-hole simulations, as the focus is on lessons and practice rather than full gameplay.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Rick Sellers Indoor Golf Center offers youth programs for ages 7 and up, including the CBC Youth Program, with a fun and engaging atmosphere for junior golfers.
